label: Game start dialog
description: Shows a dialog box when the game starts. Displays a message from a text key or direct string and plays an optional sound when closed.

text.label: Text
text.description: Direct dialog text to display. Use textKey instead for translated strings.

textKey.label: Text key
textKey.description: Translation key for the dialog text. Preferred over direct text for translated content.

closeSound.label: Close sound
closeSound.description: SoundDef played when the player closes this dialog.
